title: Assertion `memIsValid(pCtx->argv[i])' failed.
description:
yongheng added on 2020-01-10 01:31:54:
We found an assertion failed in sqlite. Here’s the POC:
—
CREATE TABLE v0 ( v1 INT CHECK( datetime ( ( NULL ) ,( '1995-09-01' ) ,( 'GERMANY' ) ,( 'MED P' ) ,( 'abc' ) ,( 'Y' ) ,( '13' ) ,( 'MED BAG' ) ,( '199419' ) ,( 'LG CASEaaaaaaaaaaaa' ) ,( '1995-09-01' ) ,( 'SM BOX' ) ,( '' ) ,( 'a' ) ,( 'c' ) ,( 'LG PACK' ) ,( 'GERMANY' ) ,( 'DELIVER IN PERSON' ) ,( 'EUROPE' ) ,( 'abc' ) ,( 'MED BAG' ) ,( 'integrity-check' ) ,( 'PROMO%%' ) ,( 'integrity-check' ) ,( 'abc' ) ,( '30' ) ,( '%%BRASS' ) ,( 'forest%%' ) ,( 'AIR' ) ,( 'LG PACK' ) ,( 'LG PACK' ) ,( 'LG CASEaaaaaaaaaaaa' ) ,( 'GERMANY' ) ,( 'MED PACK' ) ,( 'AIR' ) ,( 'MED PACK' ) ,( '23' ) ,( 'test' ) ,( '31' ) ,( 'Brand#34' ) ,( 'PROMO%%' ) ,( '1995-03-15' ) ,( 'PROMO%%' ) ,( 'X' ) ,( '**%s**' ) ,( 'forest%%' ) ,( 10 ) ,( NULL ) , v1 ) = v1 ) ) ;
INSERT INTO v0 ( v1 ) VALUES ( 10 ) ,( 9 ) ,( 10 ) ,( 'bbbbbbbbaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaabbbbbbbbaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa' ) ,( '18' ) ,( 10.100000 ) ,( 0 ) ,( 0 ) ,( 10 ) ,( 10 ) ,( 'SM PACK' ) ;
—-

This exists in the debug built of latest chunk.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value VARCHAR(255) CHECK(datetime(NULL, '2023-01-01', 'GERMANY', 'MED P', 'abc', 'Y', '13', 'MED BAG', '199419', 'LG CASE', '2023-01-01', 'SM BOX', '', 'a', 'c', 'LG PACK', 'GERMANY', 'DELIVER IN PERSON', 'EUROPE', 'abc', 'MED BAG', 'integrity-check', 'PROMO%%', 'integrity-check', 'abc', '30', '%%BRASS', 'forest%%', 'AIR', 'LG PACK', 'LG PACK', 'LG CASE', 'GERMANY', 'MED PACK', 'AIR', 'MED PACK', '23', 'test', '31', 'Brand#34', 'PROMO%%', '2023-03-15', 'PROMO%%', 'X', '**%s**', 'forest%%', 10, NULL, id) = id);
CREATE TABLE another_table (ref_id INT, description VARCHAR(255), FOREIGN KEY(ref_id) REFERENCES test_table(id));
SELECT a.id, a.value, b.description FROM test_table a LEFT JOIN another_table b ON a.id = b.ref_id WHERE a.value IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: CHECK constraint with datetime function on NULL value
